# Fabian Miranda - Creative Technologist & AI Solutions Architect

> Personal portfolio and blog of Fabian Miranda, a creative technologist and AI solutions architect based in Costa Rica with 20+ years of experience.

## About

Fabian Miranda is an AI Solutions Architect and Implementation Consultant based in San José, Costa Rica. He specializes in nearshore software development, AI integration consulting, and full-stack web development for US and global clients. With 20 years of experience spanning Fortune 500 companies and startups, he bridges the gap between creative design and technical implementation.

## Expertise

- AI Solutions Architecture & Implementation (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini)
- RAG Systems & AI Agent Development (MCP integrations)
- Full-Stack Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js)
- Nearshore Development from Costa Rica (GMT-6, US timezone aligned)
- Digital Production (display ads, rich media, HTML email)
- Tech Consulting & Strategy

## Services

- AI-Powered Software Development: https://fabianmiranda.com/services
